overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 depicting a walk through Night City. The clip begins at a street corner with a prominent pink billboard, proceeds through a graffiti-covered pedestrian tunnel, and continues along a futuristic urban sidewalk with elevated highways and corporate architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner under overpass with large billboard

events.description: crossing the street at the crosswalk while vehicles pass by

agents.ego_description: waiting at the corner then walking across the crosswalk toward the tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving past the crosswalk

entered.detail: large pink neon billboard with bold white text mounted on building
massive concrete highway overpass creating partial cover overhead
white striped pedestrian crossing lines on asphalt

segments.scene_description: The scene opens at a street corner under a concrete overpass in a cyberpunk city. A prominent pink billboard reading 'WATSON WHORE' dominates the left side. The camera waits at the crosswalk then proceeds to cross the street as futuristic vehicles drive past, heading toward a dark tunnel entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: graffiti-covered pedestrian tunnel with fluorescent lighting

events.description: entering the covered tunnel from the bright street outside
approaching the tunnel exit with increasing brightness visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the tunnel passing other pedestrians walking in both directions

notable_agents.action: man in blue vest and yellow tie walking in opposite direction

entered.detail: concrete wall covered in colorful spray paint, tags, and street art
linear overhead fluorescent light fixtures illuminating the tunnel
rough gray concrete surfaces of the underpass structure

segments.scene_description: The camera enters a dimly lit pedestrian tunnel with walls covered in vibrant graffiti. Fluorescent lights line the ceiling as the camera walks forward, passing pedestrians moving in the opposite direction. The tunnel creates an enclosed, urban atmosphere with concrete walls on both sides.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street with red corporate building and elevated highways

events.description: exiting the dark tunnel into bright sunlight and open urban space
turning right onto the sidewalk alongside the large red building

agents.ego_description: exiting the tunnel, turning right, and walking along the sidewalk next to traffic

notable_agents.action: black sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive industrial red building with corporate logo and vertical vents
multi-level highway overpass structure with red support beams
traffic signal pole showing green light

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the tunnel into bright daylight, the scene reveals a futuristic urban street dominated by a massive red corporate building. The camera turns right onto a sidewalk, following the flow of pedestrians. Elevated highways crisscross overhead while vehicles drive along the street below.

scene_state.functional_zone: sidewalk alongside glass facade with overhead highway structures

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk under the elevated highway structures

entered.detail: modern building with reflective dark glass windows
tropical palm trees lining the street median
black metal barrier separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows a continuous walk along a sidewalk bordered by a glass facade building on the right and a metal railing on the left. The elevated highway structures dominate the overhead view, casting shadows on the street. Palm trees are visible in the distance as the camera moves steadily forward through the urban canyon.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a neon-lit street corner through a claustrophobic urban tunnel and out into a sprawling corporate district. It begins under a concrete overpass dominated by a prominent pink billboard, moving across a busy street as futuristic vehicles pass by toward a dark tunnel entrance. As the camera enters the tunnel, the environment shifts into a dimly lit, enclosed space with fluorescent ceiling lights and walls covered in vibrant graffiti. The scene then opens into bright daylight upon emerging from the tunnel, revealing a massive red corporate building and a network of elevated highways crisscrossing overhead. Finally, the camera turns onto a sidewalk bordered by a glass facade, moving steadily through an urban canyon of metal railings and towering structures toward distant palm trees.
